    Reference

    All functions

    as.data.frame(<weather_station>)

    Create a data.frame from a weather station object

    bound_mech_avg()

    Mechanical internal boundary layer; average height.

    bound_mech_low()

    Mechanical internal boundary layer; lowest height.

    bound_thermal_avg()

    Thermal internal boundary layer.

    build_weather_station()

    Build a weather station object

    hum_absolute()

    Absolute humidity

    hum_evap_heat()

    Enthalpy of vaporization

    hum_moisture_gradient()

    Moisture gradient

    hum_precipitable_water()

    Precipitable water

    hum_specific()

    Specific humidity

    latent_bowen()

    Latent Heat using Bowen Method

    latent_monin()

    Latent Heat using Monin-Obukhov length

    latent_penman()

    Latent Heat Penman-Monteith Method

    latent_priestley_taylor()

    Latent Heat Priestley-Taylor Method

    plot_weather_station()

    Plot Weather Station Data

    pos_anemometer_height()

    Necessary Anemometer Height

    pos_max_dist()

    Maximum Distance between Climate Station and Obstacle

    pos_min_dist()

    Minimum Distance between Climate Station and Obstacle

    pres_air_density()

    Air Density

    pres_p()

    Air Pressure

    pres_sat_vapor_p()

    Saturated Vapor Pressure

    pres_vapor_p()

    Vapor Pressure

    rad_bal()

    Total Radiation Balance

    rad_diffuse_in()

    Incoming Diffused Radiation

    rad_diffuse_out()

    Diffused Outgoing Radiation

    rad_emissivity_air()

    Emissivity of the Atmosphere

    rad_lw_bal()

    Longwave Radiation Balance

    rad_lw_in()

    Longwave Incoming Radiation

    rad_lw_out()

    Longwave Outgoing Radiation

    rad_sw_bal()

    Shortwave Radiation Balance

    rad_sw_in()

    Shortwave Incoming Radiation

    rad_sw_out()

    Shortwave Outgoing Radiation

    rad_sw_toa()

    Shortwave Radiation at Top of Atmosphere

    sensible_bowen()

    Sensible Heat using Bowen Method

    sensible_monin()

    Sensible Heat using Monin-Obukhov length

    sensible_priestley_taylor()

    Sensible Heat Priestley-Taylor Method

    soil_attenuation()

    Soil Attenuation Length

    soil_heat_cap()

    Soil Volumetric Heat Capacity

    soil_heat_flux()

    Soil Heat Flux

    soil_thermal_cond()

    Soil Thermal Conductivity

    sol_azimuth()

    Solar azimuth

    sol_day_angle()

    Day angle

    sol_declination()

    Solar declination

    sol_eccentricity()

    Eccentricity factor

    sol_ecliptic_length()

    Solar ecliptic length

    sol_elevation()

    Solar elevation angle

    sol_hour_angle()

    Solar hour angle

    sol_julian_day()

    Julian day

    sol_medium_anomaly()

    Solar medium anomaly

    sol_medium_suntime()

    Solar medium suntime

    sol_time_formula()

    Solar time formula

    temp_pot_temp()

    Potential Temperature

    terr_sky_view()

    Sky View Factor

    terr_terrain_angle()

    Terrain Angle

    trans_aerosol()

    Transmittance due to aerosols

    trans_air_mass_abs()

    Absolute optical air mass

    trans_air_mass_rel()

    Relative optical air mass

    trans_gas()

    Transmittance due to gas

    trans_ozone()

    Transmittance due to ozone

    trans_rayleigh()

    Transmittance due to rayleigh scattering

    trans_vapor()

    Transmittance due to water vapor

    turb_displacement()

    Displacement height

    turb_flux_calc()

    Sensible and latent heat fluxes

    turb_flux_ex_quotient_imp()

    Exchange quotient for impulse transmission

    turb_flux_ex_quotient_temp()

    Exchange quotient for heat transmission

    turb_flux_grad_rich_no()

    Gradient-Richardson-Number

    turb_flux_imp_exchange()

    Turbulent impulse exchange

    turb_flux_monin()

    Monin-Obhukov-Length

    turb_flux_stability()

    Stability

    turb_roughness_length()

    Roughness length

    turb_ustar()

    Friction velocity
